listingData.title: Foxtale

aboutUs.brandInfo:
Foxtale At Nykaa

Foxtale At Nykaa, we understand that your needs are as unique and varied as you are. That's why we have built an extensive range of products that go beyond fulfilling your needs - they are curated to satisfy your desires and soothe your senses. We do not believe in a 'one-fits-all' approach. Instead, we make it our mission to ensure our offerings cater to a diversity of people, varied budgets, and distinct lifestyles.

Your happiness and satisfaction are woven into the very product of Foxtale. To us, it is more than just about making products. It is about providing value, utility, and delight to your everyday life. Your satisfaction serves as our compass, guiding us to do better every day.

Our courage to curate wide-ranging products comes from the steadfast confidence in our dedicated team. They are the ones who work around the clock to ensure you can shop from the comfort of your home, knowing every item from Foxtale meets the highest standards of quality and durability. Behind every product in our Foxtale is a team of professionals who have inspected and endorsed its quality - so you only get the best.

We believe in earning your trust and loyalty and know that every time you choose to buy from us, you're placing your faith in Foxtale. And we don't take that lightly. We reciprocate this trust by striving to provide a seamless shopping experience, from the moment you land on Nykaa.

Bestsellers.name: Foxtale De-Tan Face Mask For Tan Removal, Instant Brightening & Glowing Skin, Hydrates For 8+ Hours
Foxtale Super Glow Face Wash with Papaya Enzyme & Vitamin C for Tan Removal & Glowing Skin
Foxtale 10% Vitamin C-Glutathione Brightening Face Serum For Glowing Skin, Dark Spots & Pigmentation
Foxtale 12% Niacinamide Brightening Face Serum, Fades Dark Spots & Acne marks, For Oil Control
Foxtale Niacinamide & Cica Oil Balancing Moisturizer For Oily Skin, Lightweight & Non-Greasy
Foxtale Nourishing Ceramide Moisturizer For Barrier Repair, Hydration & Rough Skin
Foxtale Dewy Sunscreen SPF 70 PA++++ With Niacinamide + Provitamin B5 + Vitamin E

terms.text: Coupon is limited to single use per customer.
Discount may not apply if qualifying items are not added to cart when coupon is in effect.
Coupon cannot be used with other promotions ongoing on Nykaa.com during redemption.
Shipping and handling charges are applicable on all orders.
If items purchased with coupons are returned, coupon discount is subtracted from return credit.

Should you face any trouble using this promotion code or if the payment process has failed or been interrupted before you have placed your order successfully, please contact Nykaa support via this link: https://www.nykaa.com/contact_us for further assistance.
Orders placed using this coupon will be subject to the Terms and Conditions of Nykaa.com.
